

```{r}
library(ggpmisc)
library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(reshape2)
library(ggsignif)
library(patchwork)
library(qs)
library(aplot)

'%ni%'=Negate('%in%')

setwd("/home/xumeng/TCR_Dynamic/code4fithub/Fig4/")

```



```{r}

patient_ratio <- qread("/home/xumeng/TCR_Dynamic/tissue_comp/patient_ratio_new_1027.qs")


head(patient_ratio)

unique(patient_ratio$patient) %>% unique()

table(patient_ratio$tissue)

```

```{r}

data4po <- patient_ratio[, c("patient","po_TCR_ratio", "T1_TCR_pct", "depth", "tissue")] %>% unique()


cov <- c("T1_TCR_pct")

# fmla <- as.formula(paste("po_TCR_ratio ~", paste(covs_all, collapse = " + ")))
fmla <- as.formula(paste("po_TCR_ratio ~", paste(cov, collapse = " + ")))

model1 <- lm(fmla, data = data4po)


fitted_vals <- fitted(model1)

po4box <- data4po %>%
    mutate(adjusted_value = fitted_vals)

```



```{r}

data4eg <- patient_ratio[, c("patient","eg_TCR_ratio", "T2_TCR_pct",   "depth", "tissue")] %>% unique()


cov <- c("T2_TCR_pct")

fmla <- as.formula(paste("eg_TCR_ratio ~", paste(cov, collapse = " + ")))

model2 <- glm(fmla, data = data4eg)

fitted_vals <- fitted(model2)

eg4box <- data4eg %>%
    mutate(adjusted_value = fitted_vals)

```

```{r}

head(po4box)

po4box_1 <- po4box[, c("patient", "adjusted_value")]
eg4box_1 <- eg4box[, c("patient", "adjusted_value")]

ts4box_1 <- left_join(po4box_1, eg4box_1, by = "patient")

colnames(ts4box_1)[2:3] <- c("po_adj", "eg_adj")

head(ts4box_1)



ts4box_long <- ts4box_1 %>%
  gather(key = "status", value = "Ratio", po_adj, eg_adj)

ts4box_long <- ts4box_long %>%
  mutate(Tissue = str_split(patient, "@", simplify = TRUE)[, 3])


head(ts4box_long)

ts4box_long$status <- factor(ts4box_long$status, levels = c("po_adj", "eg_adj"))

ts4box_long$Tissue <- factor(ts4box_long$Tissue, levels = c("LN", "pbmc", "tumor", "nat"))

comp <- combn(c("LN", "pbmc", "tumor", "nat"), 2, simplify = FALSE)

p2 <- ggplot(ts4box_long, aes(x = Tissue, y = as.numeric(Ratio), color = Tissue)) +
      geom_point(aes(color = Tissue), position = position_jitterdodge(0.85), alpha = 0.7, stroke = NA, shape = 19)+
  scale_size(range = c(0.2, 3), name = "T2") +
      stat_summary(fun.y = median, geom = 'crossbar', width = 0.3, size = 0.1, color = 'black') +
  stat_summary(fun.data = function(x) median_hilow(x, 0.5), geom = 'errorbar', width = 0.2, size = 0.15, color = 'black') +
      scale_color_manual(values = c("pbmc" = "#a01b2b", "tumor" = "#e48d24", "LN" = "#184e41", "nat" = "#f4cf20")) +
      scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0.7, 0.9, 0.1), limits = c(0.65, 1.1)) +
      ggtitle("") +
      labs(
        x = NULL, y = "TCR Ratio",
        fill = "Tissue"
      ) +
      theme_classic() +
      facet_wrap(~ status, scales = "free", ncol = 2) +
      theme(
        axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8, color = "black"),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 9),
        axis.line = element_line(linewidth = 0.2),
        axis.ticks = element_line(linewidth = 0.2),
        axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        panel.spacing = unit(0.4, "lines"),
        strip.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = "white"),
        strip.text = element_text(size = 7, face = "bold", colour = "black"),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.text = element_text(size = 6),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 7)
      ) +
      geom_signif(
        comparisons = comp, step_increase = 0.1,
        map_signif_level = F, test = wilcox.test, test.args = list(alternative = "two.side", paired = F),
        tip_length = 0, color = "black", size = 0.2, textsize = 2
      )

p2


```
